[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0100111101 6
2 1100001111 6
3 1110110000 5
4 0111110100 6
5 1011001111 7
6 1111111111 a
7 1111110111 9
